evals.name: get-app-details-pokemon-go
evals.prompt: Get detailed information about the Pokemon GO app from Google Play Store. I need to know its current rating, number of downloads, developer information, and recent user comments.
evals.expected_output: JSON data containing app details including title, description, score, ratings, installs, developer info, and comments

evals.name: search-fitness-apps
evals.prompt: Search for fitness tracking apps on Google Play Store. Find the top 10 results for 'fitness tracker' and provide their names, ratings, and whether they're free or paid.
evals.expected_output: List of search results with app names, ratings, and pricing information

evals.name: get-app-reviews-spotify
evals.prompt: Get the 50 most recent reviews for Spotify app from Google Play Store. I want to see what users are saying recently, their ratings, and any developer replies.
evals.expected_output: List of reviews with user names, content, ratings, timestamps, and replies

evals.name: compare-messaging-apps
evals.prompt: Compare WhatsApp, Telegram, and Signal apps from Google Play Store. I need a comparison of their ratings, download numbers, and key features to understand which is most popular.
evals.expected_output: Comparison table or structured data showing ratings, installs, and key metrics for all three apps

evals.name: get-app-permissions-facebook
evals.prompt: Get the list of permissions required by the Facebook app on Google Play Store. I want to understand what access the app requests.
evals.expected_output: Dictionary of permission categories and specific permissions

evals.name: batch-fetch-multiple-apps
evals.prompt: Get details for these apps in one batch: Instagram (com.instagram.android), TikTok (com.zhiliaoapp.musically), and Twitter (com.twitter.android). Return the data in a structured format.
evals.expected_output: Structured data containing details for all three apps

assertions.name: all_three_apps
assertions.description: Returns data for all three requested apps

evals.name: analyze-negative-reviews
evals.prompt: Get 100 1-star and 2-star reviews for Uber app (com.ubercab). I want to understand what users are complaining about.
evals.expected_output: List of negative reviews with content and ratings

evals.name: localized-app-search
evals.prompt: Search for '音乐播放器' (music player) apps on Google Play Store in Chinese language (zh) and China country (cn). Return the top 10 results.
evals.expected_output: Search results localized for Chinese users
